builtinsr8
shutilr
if True:
                    import builtins
                    import os
                    import shutil
                    import sys
                    import tempfile
                    import warnings
                    tmp = tempfile.TemporaryDirectory(dir={dir!r})
                    sys.stdout.buffer.write(tmp.name.encode())
                    tmp2 = os.path.join(tmp.name, 'test_dir')
                    os.mkdir(tmp2)
                    with open(os.path.join(tmp2, "test0.txt"), "w") as f:
                        f.write("Hello world!")
                    {mod}.tmp = tmp
                    warnings.filterwarnings("always", category=ResourceWarning)
                    )
backslashreplace
Exception 
'ResourceWarning: Implicitly cleaning up
formatr
assert_python_okr}
stripr
code
tmp_namer
test_del_on_shutdown
z+TestTemporaryDirectory.test_del_on_shutdownc
)	Na
if True:
                import sys
                import tempfile
                import warnings
                def generator():
                    with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory(dir={dir!r}) as tmp:
                        yield tmp
                g = generator()
                sys.stdout.buffer.write(next(g).encode())
                warnings.filterwarnings("always", category=ResourceWarning)
                r
